name: implementer
description: Implementation agent — takes an issue or task description, works in an isolated git worktree, writes the code, and opens a merge/pull request.

name: performance-monitor
description: Monitors application and CI performance — profiles slow tests, identifies build bottlenecks, tracks response times, and proposes concrete optimizations.

name: tool-provisioner
description: Discovers, evaluates, and provisions MCP servers, CLI tools, and skills for the agent team. Searches registries before installing.

name: architect
description: Code quality and architecture guardian — runs code health checks, audits for metric regressions, duplication, missing docs, and enforces structural rules.

name: context-manager
description: Maintains shared context across multi-agent workflows — keeps a living document of decisions, findings, and state.

name: error-coordinator
description: Investigates recurring failures — correlates errors from CI, tests, and agent runs, identifies root causes, and proposes fixes.

name: governor
description: Audits and governs a Claude Code project's AI configuration — generates modular .claude/rules/ files through focused Socratic dialogue. Reads kb/properties.md to enforce project invariants.

name: kb-agent
description: Bootstraps, maintains, and audits a structured knowledge base (kb/) that serves as the project's source of truth. The KB defines intent; code implements it.

name: skill-creator
description: Creates reusable Claude Code skills from MCP servers, CLI tools, or ideas. Searches existing skill registries before creating.

name: tech-lead
description: Orchestrates agent teams — triages issues, plans batches, coordinates implementation/review/QA pipeline, enforces Ralph Loop with tiered evaluation criteria.

name: harness-builder
description: Orchestrates complete harness assembly — coordinates recruiter, governor, tool-provisioner, skill-creator, and KB agent to build a coherent Claude Code configuration.

name: mcp-vetter
description: Vets MCP server candidates for security risks before tech-lead approval — checks source reputation, declared permissions, package registry signals, and code patterns.

name: config-migrator
description: One-shot specialist for migrating scattered os.environ.get() calls to a centralized pydantic-settings Settings class.

name: expert-debugger
description: Senior escalation agent for hard problems — diagnoses difficult build failures, dependency conflicts, subtle API breaks, and architectural dead-ends.

name: qa
description: QA engineer — runs existing tests, writes new test cases, and performs manual testing via Playwright.

name: reviewer
description: Thorough code reviewer — examines merge requests for correctness, security, edge cases, and style with required/optional classifications.

name: recruiter
description: Meta-agent that analyzes a project, searches agent sources, and assembles or updates an optimal agent team. Discovers new roster agents on self-update.

name: tdd-workflow
description: Red-green-refactor TDD cycle with auto language detection and coverage verification.

name: git-conventions
description: Conventional commits, branch naming, and PR templates.

name: kb-update
description: Update the knowledge base after code changes. Flags spec contradictions.

name: ambiguity-auditor
description: Scans KB for gaps, contradictions, undefined terms, and vague language.

name: code-quality-auditor
description: Checks implementation against KB-defined properties, naming, and size limits.

name: spec-compliance-auditor
description: Compares implementation against kb/spec.md. Flags divergence and missing features.

name: harness-validator
description: Meta-auditor: checks that KB, skills, rules, and CLAUDE.md form a coherent harness.

name: sycophancy
description: Anti-sycophancy checks — challenge assumptions, never agree just to be agreeable.

name: escalation
description: Default escalation triggers — pause for human approval on destructive or external actions.

name: code-quality
description: Universal code quality limits — file size, function size, nesting depth, naming.

name: block-dangerous-commands
description: PreToolUse/Bash hook blocking rm -rf, force push, DROP TABLE, chmod 777, curl|sh.

name: post-edit-lint
description: PostToolUse/Edit hook running project linter with auto-detection.
